The '''Fel Swoop''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] located in [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]] in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Description==
The Fel Swoop was located in Treasure Ship Row, an open air market inside Coronet City's [[Blue Sector/Legends|Blue Sector]] on Corellia. It was often packed with members of [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gangs]] and served [[Corellian whiskey/Legends|Corellian whiskey]].<ref name="I, Jedi" />

==History==
In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Corellian Security Forces|Corellian Security]] members [[Gil Bastra]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] took [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] to the Fel Swoop after his [[Hal Horn|father]] died.<ref name="I, Jedi" />

By [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], the cantina had likely closed, as Treasure Ship Row was abandoned.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
